name: Nanoveu Limited
summary: Nanoveu Limited, a technology company, develops and commercializes nanoimprint science applications in the Americas and internationally. The company offers EyeFly3D, a mobile technology for smartphone and tablet users to instantly convert pictures, videos, mobile games, and streaming content from 2D into 3D. It also develops EyeFyx, a vision correction product for people with age-related farsightedness to read smartphones and tablets without reading glasses. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.
